title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. gracilis
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. gracilis, commonly known as eyebright, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which help to soothe and protect the eyes and mucous membranes. The health benefits of eyebright include reducing eye strain and puffiness, alleviating sinus and respiratory issues, and even exhibiting antimicrobial properties against certain pathogens. Eyebright can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in topical creams and eye drops, making it a versatile and natural remedy for various health concerns.
